
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Apply to Work with Justus Davis | Scale Your Digital Product Business</title>
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <!-- FontAwesome for Icons -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <!-- Canvas Confetti for Success State -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/canvas-confetti@1.6.0/dist/confetti.browser.min.js"></script>
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
            background-color: #09090b;
            color: #f4f4f5;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c084fc 0%, #6366f1 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }
        .gradient-bg {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c084fc 0%, #6366f1 100%);
        }
        .glass-card {
            background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.75);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(63, 63, 70, 0.4);
        }
        .form-progress-bar {
            transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }
        /* Custom radio styling */
        .custom-radio:checked + label {
            border-color: #a855f7;
            background-color: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-between">

        </div>
    </header>

                </div>
                <div>
                    <span class="block text-2xl font-bold text-white">Limited</span>
                    <span class="text-xs text-zinc-500">Mentorship Spots</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Column: Interactive Multi-Step Form (7 cols) -->
        <div id="apply-section" class="lg:col-span-7 w-full lg:max-w-2xl lg:ml-auto">
            <div class="glass-card rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300">
                
                <!-- Progress Header -->
                <div class="mb-8">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-zinc-400 mb-2">
                        <span class="font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase">Application Progress</span>
                        <span id="step-indicator" class="font-bold text-purple-400">Step 1 of 5</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="w-full bg-zinc-800 h-2 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div id="progress-bar" class="form-progress-bar h-full gradient-bg w-[20%]"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <form id="applicationForm" class="space-y-6" onsubmit="event.preventDefault();">
                    
                    <!-- STEP 1: Basic Information -->
                    <div class="form-step space-y-6" data-step="1">
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">Let's start with the basics</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-zinc-400">Tell us a bit about who you are and where you're joining us from.</p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300" for="name-age">What is your name and age? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                            <input type="text" id="name-age" required class="w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent transition" placeholder="e.g. Alex, 24">
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300" for="country">What country are you based in? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                            <input type="text" id="country" required class="w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent transition" placeholder="e.g. United States">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- STEP 2: Experience -->
                    <div class="form-step space-y-6 hidden" data-step="2">
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">Your Digital Product Journey</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-zinc-400">Select the option that best describes your current experience level.</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-3">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300 mb-2">What's your experience with digital products? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                            
                            <div class="relative">
                                <input type="radio" id="exp-a" name="experience" value="beginner" required class="sr-only custom-radio" checked>
                                <label for="exp-a" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                    <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">A</span>
                                        <span class="text-sm font-medium">I am a complete beginner</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-purple-500 opacity-0 transition-opacity"></i>
                                </label>
                            </div>

                            <div class="relative">
                                <input type="radio" id="exp-b" name="experience" value="intermediate" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                <label for="exp-b" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                    <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">B</span>

                                    </div>

                                </label>
                            </div>

                            <div class="relative">
                                <input type="radio" id="exp-c" name="experience" value="advanced" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                <label for="exp-c" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                    <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">C</span>
                                        <span class="text-sm font-medium text-left">I'm making some money but want to scale</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-purple-500 opacity-0 transition-opacity"></i>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- STEP 3: The System Offer -->
                    <div class="form-step space-y-6 hidden" data-step="3">
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">The Done-For-You Ecosystem</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-zinc-400">Read carefully and answer honestly.</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300 leading-relaxed">
                                If you had a completely done for you digital product that's already generated over $100k in student results, that I personally have made $80k with, and a simple step-by-step system to follow, do you think that would finally help you get started? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span>
                            </label>

                            <div class="space-y-3">
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="dfy-a" name="dfy-belief" value="yes" required class="sr-only custom-radio" checked>
                                    <label for="dfy-a" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                            <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">A</span>
                                            <span class="text-sm font-medium">Yes, that's exactly what I need</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </label>
                                </div>

                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="dfy-b" name="dfy-belief" value="maybe" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                    <label for="dfy-b" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                            <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">B</span>
                                            <span class="text-sm font-medium">I'm not sure yet</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </label>
                                </div>

                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="dfy-c" name="dfy-belief" value="no" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                    <label for="dfy-c" class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition duration-200">
                                        <div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
                                            <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-sm font-bold text-zinc-300">C</span>
                                            <span class="text-sm font-medium">No, I don't think so</span>
                                        </div>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- STEP 4: Commitment & Investment -->
                    <div class="form-step space-y-6 hidden" data-step="4">
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">Commitment & Investment</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-zinc-400">Mentorship requires dedication and resources to scale properly.</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300" for="motivation">Why do you want to work with me specifically, and how serious are you about changing your situation? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                            <textarea id="motivation" required rows="3" class="w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent transition" placeholder="Share your story and hunger to succeed..."></textarea>
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-3">
                            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300">In all honesty, if we talked and we both feel like it's a great fit, how much are you able to invest into yourself right now? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                            
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="inv-a" name="investment" value="none" required class="sr-only custom-radio" checked>
                                    <label for="inv-a" class="flex items-center p-3.5 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition text-sm">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-300 mr-2.5">A</span>
                                        <span>Not ready to invest</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="inv-b" name="investment" value="250-500" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                    <label for="inv-b" class="flex items-center p-3.5 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition text-sm">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-300 mr-2.5">B</span>
                                        <span>$250 - $500</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="inv-c" name="investment" value="500-750" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                    <label for="inv-c" class="flex items-center p-3.5 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition text-sm">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-300 mr-2.5">C</span>
                                        <span>$500 - $750</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                                <div class="relative">
                                    <input type="radio" id="inv-d" name="investment" value="750-1000" class="sr-only custom-radio">
                                    <label for="inv-d" class="flex items-center p-3.5 bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-zinc-500 transition text-sm">
                                        <span class="flex items-center justify-center w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-300 mr-2.5">D</span>
                                        <span>$750 - $1,000+</span>
                                    </label>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- STEP 5: Final Contact -->
                    <div class="form-step space-y-6 hidden" data-step="5">
                        <div class="space-y-2">
                            <h3 class="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold">One last step!</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-zinc-400">Where should we reach out with your results?</p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <div class="space-y-2">
                                <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-300" for="phone">What's the best number to reach you on? <span class="text-purple-400">*</span></label>
                                <input type="tel" id="phone" required class="w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent transition" placeholder="e.g. +1 (555) 000-0000">
                            </div>
                            <p class="text-xs text-zinc-500 leading-relaxed">
                                By submitting, you agree to receive follow-up messages from Justus regarding your application. We respect your privacy.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- SUCCESS STATE -->
                    <div id="success-state" class="hidden text-center py-8 space-y-4">
                        <div class="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/30 text-2xl mb-2">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i>
                        </div>
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold text-white">Application Received!</h3>
                        <p class="text-zinc-400 text-sm max-w-md mx-auto">
                            Thank you for your honesty and commitment. Justus and his team will review your answers carefully and text you shortly if you are a good fit.
                        </p>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Navigation Buttons -->
                    <div id="form-actions" class="flex justify-between items-center pt-4 border-t border-zinc-800/60">
                        <button type="button" id="prev-btn" class="px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition duration-200 invisible">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left mr-2"></i> Back
                        </button>
                        <button type="button" id="next-btn" class="gradient-bg hover:opacity-95 text-white px-7 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold shadow-lg shadow-purple-500/20 transition duration-200 flex items-center">
                            Continue <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                        </button>
                    </div>

                </form>

            </div>
        </div>

    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer class="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8 border-t border-zinc-900 flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-center text-xs text-zinc-500 space-y-4 sm:space-y-0">
        <div>
            &copy; 2024 Justus Davis. All rights reserved.
        </div>
        <div class="flex space-x-6">
            <a href="#" class="hover:text-zinc-300 transition">Privacy Policy</a>
            <a href="#" class="hover:text-zinc-300 transition">Terms of Service</a>
            <a href="https://instagram.com/justus_davis1" target="_blank" class="hover:text-zinc-300 transition flex items-center">
                <i class="fa-brands fa-instagram mr-1.5"></i> Instagram
            </a>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- Form Handler Logic -->
    <script>
        const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.form-step');
        const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prev-btn');
        const nextBtn = document.getElementById('next-btn');
        const progressBar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
        const stepIndicator = document.getElementById('step-indicator');
        const formActions = document.getElementById('form-actions');
        const successState = document.getElementById('success-state');

        let currentStep = 1;
        const totalSteps = steps.length;

        function updateFormUI() {
            // Update active step visibility
            steps.forEach(step => {
                const stepNum = parseInt(step.getAttribute('data-step'));
                if (stepNum === currentStep) {
                    step.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    step.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });

            // Update Progress Bar & Steps Indicator
            const progressPercentage = (currentStep / totalSteps) * 100;
            progressBar.style.width = `${progressPercentage}%`;
            stepIndicator.textContent = `Step ${currentStep} of ${totalSteps}`;

            // Back button control
            if (currentStep === 1) {
                prevBtn.classList.add('invisible');
            } else {
                prevBtn.classList.remove('invisible');
            }

            // Next / Submit Button Text
            if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
                nextBtn.innerHTML = `Submit Application <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane ml-2"></i>`;
                nextBtn.classList.remove('gradient-bg');
                nextBtn.classList.add('bg-emerald-600', 'hover:bg-emerald-500');
            } else {
                nextBtn.innerHTML = `Continue <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>`;
                nextBtn.classList.add('gradient-bg');
                nextBtn.classList.remove('bg-emerald-600', 'hover:bg-emerald-500');
            }
        }

        function validateCurrentStep() {
            const activeStepElement = document.querySelector(`.form-step[data-step="${currentStep}"]`);
            const requiredFields = activeStepElement.querySelectorAll('[required]');
            let isValid = true;

            requiredFields.forEach(field => {
                if (field.type === 'radio') {
                    // Check if at least one radio of this name group is checked
                    const nameGroup = field.getAttribute('name');
                    const checkedRadio = activeStepElement.querySelector(`input[name="${nameGroup}"]:checked`);
                    if (!checkedRadio) {
                        isValid = false;
                        field.focus();
                    }
                } else {
                    if (!field.value.trim()) {
                        isValid = false;
                        field.classList.add('border-red-500');
                        field.focus();
                    } else {
                        field.classList.remove('border-red-500');
                    }
                }
            });

            return isValid;
        }

        nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!validateCurrentStep()) return;

            if (currentStep < totalSteps) {
                currentStep++;
                updateFormUI();
            } else {
                // Submit Form
                handleSubmit();
            }
        });

        prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (currentStep > 1) {
                currentStep--;
                updateFormUI();
            }
        });

        function handleSubmit() {
            // Hide navigation action bar and current active form step
            formActions.classList.add('hidden');
            steps.forEach(step => step.classList.add('hidden'));
            stepIndicator.parentElement.classList.add('hidden');
            progressBar.parentElement.classList.add('hidden');

            // Show Success State
            successState.classList.remove('hidden');

            // Trigger Celebration
            confetti({
                particleCount: 150,
                spread: 80,
                origin: { y: 0.6 },
                colors: ['#a855f7', '#6366f1', '#10b981']
            });
        }

        // Add soft listener to clear red validation borders when typing
        document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea').forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('input', () => {
                el.classList.remove('border-red-500');
            });
        });
    </script>

</body>
</html>
```
